title: ReplayMod in Datapack
description: [1.20.5+] ReplayMod Datapack [Multiplayer Friendly] (Record and Replay Your Path, Movement, and Rotation!)
body:
# Replay Datapack v2.1
## created by Nos

### How to use:
- start recording your movement and rotation


```
/trigger RP-record
```


- pause recording
```
/trigger RP-pause
```

- resume recording
```
/trigger RP-resume﻿
```


- stop recording
```
/trigger RP-stop
```

- save your recording
```
/trigger RP-save﻿
```

- summon a villager for replaying.
```
/trigger RP-replay
```

- Admin mode (For observing others' path):
```
/tag @s add admin
```

- Note: You need to use this command to start replaying others path. Replace player's username inside the square bracket.
```
/trigger RP-replay
/tag @e[type=villager,tag=replay,sort=nearest,limit=1] add [Username]
```

### Performances:

- TPS/MSPT are not affected, the datapack is lightweight.

### Demonstration:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/ObHAXI2dsZs" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

### Other information:
﻿Position and rotation are saved in data storage per 1 tick, which is enough for recording precise movement.

Enjoy!

Youtube: [[Link]](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCivH8zsyaT6Nit6D4VitwFg)

Discord: [[Link]](https://discord.gg/xC8Sgkt8)
